reforms.description: The investment policy proposes a dynamic approach based on tax incentives and active public sector participation to stimulate investment, particularly in sectors that generate profitability and foreign exchange inflow.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By incentivizing investment, the policy aims to enhance productivity and economic growth through increased capital formation.
reforms.status_evidence: The programme proposes a dynamic investment policy based essentially on tax incentives and active public sector participation.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant shift in investment policy aimed at modernizing the economy and enhancing productivity through targeted incentives.
reforms.source_quote: The programme proposes a dynamic investment policy based essentially on tax incentives and active public sector participation.
